label: Case-result / podcast / supplementary media

items.description: Cover art for the firm's 'Lawyers and Lay People' podcast, featuring the firm logo over a stock gavel/scales/law-book background
items.use: Optional supplementary asset for a podcast/media section; not a case-result or work photo

notes: No case-result, before/after, or 'work in progress' photos exist on the site, this firm is a service/consultation business (personal injury and bankruptcy law), not a visual-trade niche, so this category is not expected to carry much weight. The podcast cover is the only non-logo, non-portrait graphic found and is included as supplementary media.
